deals.title: 8449 Coughran Rd
deals.notes: Estate sale cash deal at $152K. Lien blocker resolved Apr 21 via Fernando Castillo signature at mobile notary. Cleared and funded Apr 26, officially closed Apr 27.
deals.next: Deliver Joy gift basket, rug, trolley. Thank Sam VanDenheuvel, Chelsey Bongiovi, Michael (notary), UPS Store staff. Confirm commission received.

logs.m: Officially closed and funded. Post-close gifts and thank-yous still pending.
Cleared, funded and closed.
Follow-up email sent to Alyssa Castillo at Chicago Title.
Fernando Castillo signed lien release at mobile notary. Release delivered to Chicago Title. Joyce signed at UPS Store.
Called Reliable Title. Chelsey Bongiovi confirmed lien prepared at Deeds.com.
Spoke with Fabian Cerrillo — family member of Fernando Castillo, willing to work with us.
Joyce sent lien bypass form. Chris managing on behalf of estate.

deals.title: Steve Jimenez — Tilden 20ac
deals.notes: 20-acre hunting property. First offer (Michael Rodriguez / RBFCU) dead — no earnest money received. Steve finished clearing property. New prospect wants to show — interested in subdividing or alternate use. Strategy: land-only cash deal, buyer does what they need after close.
deals.next: Follow up with new prospect. When next offer comes, lead with net after close. Schedule drone footage for upgraded marketing.

logs.m: Steve sent new photos. New prospect interested in subdividing — sent her info and set expectations on cash/land-only approach.
Clearing complete. Photos posted to social. Drone footage flagged as next priority. First offer confirmed dead.
Offer basically dead. Option money not received. Steve more open to overall picture on offers. Key message: net after close is what matters.
RBFCU financing decision expected Apr 10 — stalled.

deals.title: 181 CR 7751
deals.notes: Bank-owned foreclosure. Matt Toney (HouzzPro / San Antonio Remodeling) selected at $54,877. Dumpsters dropped Saturday May 9. Work is active and moving. New VA buyer lead: Bryce (dumpster contractor) — wife is active military, renting, looking to buy.
deals.next: Get Bryce contact info for VA buyer lead. Monitor renovation progress. Establish listing timeline once work scopes complete. Police report still needed from city office.

logs.m: On-site visit. Met Bryce (dumpster contractor). His wife is active military, recently moved from Ohio, renting — VA buyer lead. Work active since Saturday.
Work officially starting — Matt Toney dropping dumpsters this weekend.
Met Matt Toney in office. Connected him directly with Jerry Sadler (Priority Bank) by phone. Goal: work starts by Monday.
Two estimates compared: HouzzPro $54,877 vs T&T $61,980. Jerry Sadler recommended HouzzPro. Ray Stidham confirmed as bank decision-maker.
Bank damage liability clarified — damage occurred after bank possession. Kendall pricing flagged high. Alternatives being explored.
Kelly confirmed bank took back home in December. Damage after bank possession. Meeting Matt Van Gorder on-site for estimate.
Shot video and photos. Sent to Kendall and Matt Van Gorder for contractor quotes.

deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr
deals.notes: Sellers are underwater by $93K-$143K on VA loan, double-carrying costs, property vacant 6 months. Market value $350K-$400K vs payoff ~$493K. Three paths: Short Sale (Path A), VA Loan Assumption (Path B), Price Reduction and cash to close (Path C). Landscaper scheduled May 12 for yard quote.
deals.next: Talk to broker first — short sale protocol and investor introduction guidelines. Then call Matt and Chandler to present three paths and confirm which they have appetite for.

logs.m: Stopped by property. Put mail inside. Met landscaper at clubhouse — stopping by May 12 for quote and yard cut. Still need showing feedback from May 5.
Dropping sign and lockbox at property when in Devine. Keep marketing.
Showing by outside agent at 2pm. Lawn care referral received — Morales Tree Trimming 830-444-7804. A.M. Lawn Care also visiting for quote.
Express Offers returned $550K — likely off given CMA. Flag for sellers. Showing scheduled May 4 at 2pm. Checking in with Matt and Chandler on options summary.
Full market analysis completed. Underwater by $93K-$143K. Three paths identified. 717 Jack Nicklaus just listed at $519K — newer, direct competitor.
Gilberto buyers wishy-washy — seller finance likely dead. Honest price adjustment conversation needed with Matt and Chandler.
Showing at property for potential owner finance buyer.

deals.title: Mike and Alice Howell
deals.notes: Rental being sold — duplex renovated, rents going up, need to move fast. Pivoted to new construction with no HOA requirement. Pre-approval in progress with Zach Schaphorst. Sent showingnew.com/chrisdrawdy for them to browse.
deals.next: Confirm pre-approval amount with Zach Schaphorst. Identify no-HOA new construction communities. Schedule model home visits. Rental clock is ticking.

logs.m: Sent showingnew.com/chrisdrawdy for new construction browsing. Next: confirm Zach pre-approval status.
Mike texted — rental property being sold, duplex renovated, rents going up. 916 Marriott assessed and passed (foundation issues). Pivoting to new construction with rate buydowns.
Connected with Zach Schaphorst. Paid off debt. 30-day wait recommended before credit pull. Pre-approval expected Feb 2026.

deals.title: Colton and Abby Brown
deals.notes: Prior clients — Chris helped them purchase Moore TX home with VA renovation loan. Going through a divorce. Need to finish renovation and sell. Colton also looking for contractor work — being considered for 181 CR 7751 job.
deals.next: Reach out to Colton — confirm listing timeline and property status. Get his quote and availability for 181 CR 7751. Check if Moore TX needs a referral agent.

logs.m: File updated. Colton flagged for contractor work at 181 CR 7751. Moore TX referral agent check needed.

deals.title: Kurt — 9815 Conbes
deals.notes: Neighbor of 9815 Conbes listing. That listing is under contract at $275,000. Kurt wants intel on offers received. Possible seller or buyer lead — needs follow-up to determine intent.
deals.next: Follow up with listing agent on 9815 Conbes for offer details. Report back to Kurt. Determine if he is a potential seller, buyer, or just curious neighbor.

logs.m: Kurt reached out wanting intel on 9815 Conbes — listed under contract at $275K. Intent unclear.

deals.title: 3504 Painted Riv
deals.notes: Off-market flip analysis requested by Homestead Vested. Purchase $199K, rehab $65K, ARV $340K, projected profit $42K-$62K. CMA shows avg sale $207K, best comps at $140-$152/sqft. Being used as basis for building a branded property analysis template.
deals.next: Pull MLS comps and RPR report. Feed to Sirhc and build first analysis sheet. Lock template for reuse on future deals.

logs.m: Investor sent deal via homesteadvested.com link. Numbers pulled and analysis started. Using as first build for property analysis tool.

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path
deals.notes: Referral from Isaac Linares. Sellers relocating to NC, must sell by second week of June. Listing agreement signed. Photos in from ATG. Going live Wednesday May 13. List price $259,900. Foundation hairline crack flagged for disclosure. Pre-inspection done May 2 with Coach Ricky Smith.
deals.next: Launch MLS listing Wednesday May 13. Drop sign and lockbox Tuesday May 12. Begin neighborhood canvassing Tuesday. Thank Isaac Linares personally.

logs.m: Neighborhood canvassing and sign/lockbox drop moved to Tuesday May 12.
Listing agreement signed. ATG photos received. Going live Wednesday May 13.
Pre-inspection scheduled 8:30 AM with Coach Ricky Smith. Chris arriving ~10 AM to review findings.
Katy reviewing listing agreement. Payoff discrepancy ($170K stated vs $192K public records) still unresolved.

Listing consultation on-site with Chris, Isaac, Jose, and Katherine. Went well. Seller packet delivered. Foundation crack and payoff discrepancy discussed. Jose and Katherine confirmed moving forward via email same afternoon.
Referral from Isaac Linares. Sellers motivated — NC relocation, June deadline. CMA completed at $259,900.

deals.title: 00 Borregas
deals.notes: Land listing with development potential. Title defect confirmed — Deed 20100079485 has incomplete legal description, Exhibits C and F never attached at recording. Attorney Van Hutchins preparing Correction Deed. ENV Title (Jessica Guevara) reviewing. Jennifer Ball co-owner is driving resolution. Isaac Linares offered ~$150K for mobile home development — half units for veterans, half for profit.
deals.next: Pull listing agreement to check who signed. Call sisters. Get attorney fee estimate from Van Hutchins. Follow up with Isaac on mobile home project timeline and formal offer.

logs.m: Jennifer Ball email received. Title defect confirmed — Exhibits C and F missing from recorded deed. Van Hutchins preparing Correction Deed. ENV Title reviewing draft. Isaac also exploring owner finance options, buyers would need ~$15K down.
Updated sisters on Apr 20 showing. Discussed Isaac development interest — $150K offer contingent on mobile home project. Sisters enthusiastic.
Showing occurred. Dedicated call block on Borregas prospects.
Noted as active call priority. Prospects need outreach.

deals.title: Moran — New Construction Buyer
deals.notes: Buyer rep agreement signed May 7. Budget $50K down, target ~$1,000/mo payment. Not locked to one builder — multiple options being pulled. MI Homes (Frank) found option under $1,200/mo. Also coordinating rental setup at 8527 Green Bliss for Jimbo Stringer (Brandon uncle).
deals.next: Send buyer rep agreement to Brandon mom tonight. Send Jimbo everything to get Green Bliss rental listing going. Review Jimbo son flyers. Follow up with new home sales reps on inventory options.

logs.m: MI Homes Frank found option under $1,200/mo. Spoke with Jimbo — need to send him rental listing materials and review son flyers. Buyer rep still needs to go to Brandon mom.
Buyer rep signed. Rental setup docs in folder for 8527 Green Bliss.

leads.title: Mike and Alice Howell

leads.next: Confirm pre-approval amount with Zach. Identify no-HOA new construction communities. Schedule model home visits.

logs.m: Pre-approval in progress. Sent new construction search platform. Pivoted fully to new construction.
Added to pipeline via Bold Trail sync.

leads.title: Pamela Moore
leads.detail: Paying $1,700/mo rent. Military retirement income plus daughters disability checks. Between jobs. Fixing credit proactively. VA loan likely — zero down. Connected via Nextdoor High Country neighborhood. Spoke Apr 29 — sick grandkid, warm conversation.
leads.next: Call or text — check in on grandkid first, then ease back into home conversation. Connect with VA-approved lender when ready.

logs.m: Spoke today — sick grandkid, warm convo. Following up Apr 30.
4 days since last text, no response. Still hot — VA eligibility and motivation strong.
Follow-up text sent. Military retirement confirmed as primary qualifying income. Daughters disability may stack as co-borrowers.
Connected on Nextdoor High Country. She posted about $1,700/mo rent and fixing credit.

leads.title: Isaac Linares
leads.detail: Mobile home seller and small acreage lot specialist. Referred 10023 Mill Path. Development interest in 00 Borregas (~$150K offer if mobile home project moves forward). Partner Adam Rodriguez also engaged. EMD discrepancy (~$1,200) across two of their deals with title company — Chris reviewing.
leads.next: Thank Isaac personally for Mill Path referral. Follow up on Borregas development offer and mobile home project timeline. Resolve Adam EMD contract discrepancy.

logs.m: Lunch with Isaac and Adam after Mill Path consultation. Off-market deals, bulk lots, Borregas development discussed. Adam EMD discrepancy flagged.
First referral delivered — 10023 Mill Path. Relationship building strong.
Met Chris. Immediate referral. Strong community connector — church network.

logs.m: Kurt reached out wanting intel on 9815 Conbes — under contract at $275K. Intent unclear.

leads.title: Sallie Mae F.
leads.detail: Community connection from garden share group. Grief to healing to plants story. Potential content collaboration with permission. Real estate potential is trust-based and long-term — no rush.
leads.next: Follow up personally. Check in. Ask permission to share her story for content. Keep nurturing — no real estate pressure.

logs.m: File created. Connection through Little Red House garden community. Content angle identified — needs her permission before proceeding.

leads.title: Isaac (Investor — Schertz)
leads.detail: Investor met in person Apr 18. Buy box unknown. Area of interest likely Schertz based on context. Full intake still needed — budget, timeline, strategy (flip vs hold).
leads.next: Full intake call — buy box, budget, timeline, flip vs hold strategy. Add to Bold Trail. Connect on active deals if criteria match.

logs.m: Met in person. Investor interested in Schertz area. No further details yet — intake call needed.

leads.title: Jahsia
leads.detail: 18 years old, finishing senior year. Interested in getting into real estate. Referred by Julie (veteran buyer lead) during Apr 30 conversation. Julie is connected through her daughter's boyfriend.
leads.next: Get Jahsia contact info from Julie. Reach out with intro call — explain licensing path and what eXp looks like.

logs.m: Referred by Julie during morning call. Young, motivated, interested in real estate licensing.

leads.title: Armando
leads.detail: Referred by David Roth (210-708-5644) through employee buyer program. Budget $50K down, target ~$1,000/mo payment. Not locked to a specific builder or neighborhood — open to options. Need to register as buyer agent before any builder visit.
leads.next: Get Armando contact info from David Roth. Pull new construction options from DR Horton, MI Homes, Lennar, and area builders that fit $50K down and ~$1,000/mo. Register as buyer agent before first builder visit.

logs.m: Referred by David Roth. Employee buyer program. Budget $50K down, target $1,000/mo. Multiple builders to explore.

leads.title: Bryce (VA Buyer — Devine)
leads.detail: Met on-site at 181 CR 7751 on May 11. Dumpster contractor on the job. Wife is active military — recently moved from Ohio, currently renting, looking to buy a home. VA loan opportunity. Contact info still needed.
leads.next: Get Bryce contact info. Reach out to connect — introduce VA loan benefits and set up buyer consultation.

logs.m: Met at 181 CR 7751 on-site. Wife is active military, moved from Ohio, renting and looking to buy. VA buyer lead identified.
